extensionDescription.message: Hide and toggle ads with unreliable motors on car listings (PureTech, THP, BlueHDi, etc.)

adsHiddenOnThisPage.message: unreliable ads hidden on this page

privacyDescription.message: To hide unreliable car ads, this extension needs to process page content locally.

privacyPoint1.message: All data stays on your computer

privacyPoint2.message: No browsing history is collected or shared

privacyPoint3.message: No personal data is sent to external servers
